comment: Detective note system test scene — grants clues, unlocks/upgrades the topic, then plays the APPROVED stamp. Chapter resolves from this scene path (registered in detective_note_vault.json).
text: Detective note test. This beat granted two clues and unlocked the topic — watch for the toasts, then tap the notebook icon at the bottom right (or hover it for half a second).
This beat granted the remaining clues and expanded the verdict map to level 2.
Next: the APPROVED stamp animation on the read-only verdict map. Tap anywhere to dismiss it once the animation finishes.
The topic is now stamped and read-only. Opening the notebook again shows the stamp resting on the map. End of test.
